rows.label: qev040907_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well if it isn't Muimui. Are
you still searching for that
legendary sword of yours?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0002
rows.name:
Listen to me, stop talking about
such pipe dreams and steadily complete
your missions like I always...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmph! Can you keep up that nagging
even after seeing this-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Now! Please hand the legendary
sword over to this noisy mister-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0005
rows.name: Wh... this is...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0006
rows.name:
It certainly is completely different
from other Nopon collections[ST:wide ]—its value
as research material looks quite high.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0007
rows.name: Where on earth did you find this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev040907_SEL0011
rows.name:
Reply that you obtained it in
the White Tree Continent.

rows.label: qev040907_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040907_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask why such a thing is necessary.

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0008
rows.name: The White Tree Continent...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0009
rows.name:
Just what kind of battles were
the Nopon waging using this sword
in such a dangerous place...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0010
rows.name:
This... will surely become a valuable
research material that will greatly
advance our investigation of planet Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0011
rows.name:
Well, I'm not a scholar, so I
don't know the details, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0012
rows.name:
It seems artifacts from the native
Nopon will be a major key to unlocking
the mysteries of planet Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hrm... an ancient sword like this will
surely be a research material that greatly
advances our Mira investigation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0014
rows.name:
Well done, Muimui. This is a top-tier
accomplishment for a Collepedian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0015
rows.name:
Right-mo!? Right-mo!? Respect
Muimui a whole lot and hand
over a to~n of rewards-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0016
rows.name: I get it, I get it! Take this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0017
rows.name:
You've put your younger brother
through a lot of trouble, right?
Don't go wasting it all, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0018
rows.name:
Yay-mo~!! With this much, we can
have a lavish feast until our
stomachs are completely full-mo~!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0019
rows.name:
Let's immediately go to the cafe where
Moimoi is preparing the party venue-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040907_MSG0020
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! Hurry-mo! At this rate,
Muimui's stomach and back are
going to stick together-mo~![ST:wait ]
